# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: "build-output"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - mkdir -p dist config
    - echo "binary-content" > dist/app.bin
    - echo "config-content" > config/app.conf
    - chmod +x dist/app.bin || true
  artifacts:
    name: "$ARTIFACT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - dist/
      - config/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - ls -la dist config
    - test -f dist/app.bin
    - test -f config/app.conf
    - echo "Running tests with downloaded artifacts..."
    - sh -c 'echo "test ok"'

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: staging
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging using artifacts..."
    - chmod +x dist/app.bin || true
    - ./dist/app.bin || true
    - cat config/app.conf

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: production
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production using artifacts..."
    - chmod +x dist/app.bin || true
    - ./dist/app.bin || true
    - cat config/app.conf
